creator: patrick.oonk@pine.nl
text:
On the box mentioned before it now stays alive for some reason, on an
other one (FreeBSD 8.2) net-snmp-5.7_3 still crashes:

Oct  5 13:05:39 xxx snmpd[91569]: compare:index:
Oct  5 13:05:39 xxx snmpd[91569]: result was 0
Oct  5 13:05:39 xxx snmpd[91569]: trace:
Oct  5 13:05:39 xxx snmpd[91569]: _fs_type():
hardware/fsys/fsys_getfsstats.c, 63:
Oct  5 13:05:39 xxx snmpd[91569]: fsys:type:
Oct  5 13:05:39 xxx snmpd[91569]: Classifying ufs
